ASTM NetRID Service Provider operator notification on missing fields

scenarios.astm.netrid.v19.SpOperatorNotifyMissingFields

Resources

  • flights_data provided by kentland_flights_data in top-level resource pool
  • service_providers provided by netrid_service_providers_v19 in top-level resource pool
  • evaluation_configuration provided by netrid_observation_evaluation_configuration in top-level resource pool
